command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PQbAAV1fA3eoWB.a0d8e518ba41 --database MgQxaanSGfXUBb8hYhdAS9 --execute 
ALTER TABLE `users`
  ADD COLUMN `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  ADD COLUMN `updated_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3);
